title: Cirno's Perfect Math Academy - beatMARIO + Hatsune Miku 【Touhou MV】 (English Subs)
description:
Let's all be a ⑨ / BAKA

The song was re-arranged by beatMARIO as part of the 2nd Touhou Collaboration with Project SEKAI. The Game ver. was performed by VIRTUAL SINGER aka VOCALOID.


Song Title: Cirno's Perfect Math Academy "チルノのパーフェクトさんすう学園" (BeatMARIO's Original Remake of IOSYS Cirno's Perfect Math Class)
Original title: Beloved Tomboyish Girl
Source: Touhou Embodiment of Scarlet Devil (東方紅魔郷　～ the Embodiment of Scarlet Devil)

Producer List:-
Vocal：beatMARIO
Lyrics:beatMARIO x Maron, Youno Yoshimi(IOSYS)
Composed by: ZUN (Team Shanghai Alice)
Arrangement: beatMARIO x Maron, ARM (IOSYS)
Illust & movie: Hitobito  
Illust special support: Suwa 
logo design support : Hitomasu Modoru   
guitar : Hiroto Kobayashi 
mastering : Shibayan (ShibayanRecords)  
voice : Maron Amane Kitsumuso Shuzo




Project Sekai (VIRTUAL SINGER / VOCALOID):
Hatsune Miku (初音ミク)
Kagamine Rin (鏡音リン)
Kagamine Len (鏡音レン)
Megurine Luka (巡音ルカ)
